params.name: Bell's Telephone
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishes (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Oct 3, 1875, Bell invented the first telephone.

In order to make a telephone, Bell and his assistants conducted many different experiments. There was once when Bell and Watson were communicating by pressing the receiver tightly to their ears with them in two closed rooms. Suddenly, he heard a sound as weak as a mosquito buzz from the receiver, "Mr. Watson, help!" Watson was overjoyed and shouted loudly, "I heard you! Loud and clear!" He rushed out and ran to Bell's room. They hugged and cele …
